z\n}\n\n// Does any valid solution exist?\nghost predicate SolutionExists(x: int, y: int, z: int)\n  requires x > 0 && y > 0 && z > 0\n{\n  exists a ::\n    exists b ::\n      exists c ::\n        IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c)\n}\n\nmethod ThreePairwiseMaximums(x: int, y: int, z: int) returns (possible: bool, a: int, b: int, c: int)\n  requires x > 0 && y > 0 && z > 0\n  ensures possible == SolutionExists(x, y, z)\n  ensures possible ==> IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c)\n{\n  var m := x;\n  if y > m { m := y; }\n  if z > m { m := z; }\n\n  var cnt := 0;\n  if x == m { cnt := cnt + 1; then y else z;\n    assert IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c);\n  } else {\n    possible := false;\n    a := 0;\n    b := 0;\n    c := 0;\n    // cnt == 1: exactly one of x,y,z equals m = max(x,y,z)\n }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9160,"cache_read_input_tokens":20017,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":9160},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"99e652ad-9a95-4460-9e5c-42363a09f0c7","uuid":"a40cee5a-1c23-4b12-9e5f-348b9fa6f5e7"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TTceQ2U3xscYGenamc5xsW","type":"tool_result","content":"File z\n}\n\n// Does any valid solution exist?\nghost predicate SolutionExists(x: int, y: int, z: int)\n  requires x > 0 && y > 0 && z > 0\n{\n  exists a ::\n    exists b ::\n      exists c ::\n SolutionExists(x, y, z)\n  ensures possible ==> IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c)\n{\n  var m := x;\n  if y > m { m := y; }\n  if z > m { m := z; }\n\n  var cnt := 0;\n  if x == m { cnt := cnt + 1; then y else z;\n    assert IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c);\n  } else {\n    possible := false;\n    a := 0;\n    b := 0;\n    c := 0;\n    // cnt == 1: exactly one of x,y,z equals m = max(x,y,z)\n
